title: Fix unique-constraint collision with dynamic test data
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/unique_collision_test.exs` has two tests both creating users with `email: "test@example.com"`. Under async mode these can race on the unique constraint. Rewrite to `test/my_app/accounts_test.exs`: generate unique emails per test via `"user_#{Ecto.UUID.generate()}@example.com"` and preserve `async: true`.
research_citation: "If your data should be unique, make it unique across all tests" — AppSignal
